advancements.kaleidoscope_cookery.add_br: Making different flavored soups requires adding different broths first!
advancements.kaleidoscope_cookery.add_oi: Add oil to the pot, or use kitchen shovel to scoop oil from enamel basin into the pot, start cooking!
Sneak and throw a baozi to hit a wolf and heal it
Meat Bun Beats the Dog, No Return!
advancements.kaleidoscope_cookery.burn_h: The pot won't tolerate wrong ingredients and will punish you for taking them back
Stockpot with lava broth won't tolerate wrong ingredients and will punish you for taking them back
advancements.kaleidoscope_cookery.caterp: Always find these chubby guys in the fields
advancements.kaleidoscope_cookery.choppi: Use kitchen knife on chopping board to prepare new ingredients
advancements.kaleidoscope_cookery.danger: Use kitchen knife to kill piglin brutes

advancements.kaleidoscope_cookery.dual_c: Harvest both green and red chili!
advancements.kaleidoscope_cookery.farmer: Wear the complete farmer set to greatly increase rice transplanting speed in water
advancements.kaleidoscope_cookery.fish_r: Accelerate rice growth by raising fish in rice fields!
advancements.kaleidoscope_cookery.flower: Craft a flower straw hat, it's pretty, though nothing special, but it's really pretty
advancements.kaleidoscope_cookery.iron_h: Use hoe to cultivate paddy fields in water for rice transplanting
advancements.kaleidoscope_cookery.iron_k: Even High Kung Fu Fears Kitchen Knife
advancements.kaleidoscope_cookery.make_s: After adding ingredients to the pot, cover with lid to make soup. When soup is ready, lift the lid and use bowl to serve!
advancements.kaleidoscope_cookery.millst: Ride a donkey to drive the millstone
advancements.kaleidoscope_cookery.nether: Upgrade your kitchen knife to netherite level
advancements.kaleidoscope_cookery.nitrog: Climb 100 blocks high while having flatulence buff
Climb 1000 blocks high while having flatulence buff

Climb 3000 blocks high while having flatulence buff
advancements.kaleidoscope_cookery.oil.de: Use kitchen knife to kill pigs, piglins, or hoglins to get oil
advancements.kaleidoscope_cookery.oil_po: Place the oil pot under the millstone
advancements.kaleidoscope_cookery.pot.de: Craft a pot and place it above heat sources like stoves or campfires
advancements.kaleidoscope_cookery.rice_p: The harvest season, increasingly missing the late gentleman...
advancements.kaleidoscope_cookery.root.d: Add a touch of fantasy to the world!
advancements.kaleidoscope_cookery.scarec: Use scarecrow to protect surrounding farmland
Use skulls to replace the scarecrow's pumpkin head
advancements.kaleidoscope_cookery.steame: Place the steamer on a heat source to steam food
advancements.kaleidoscope_cookery.stir_f: After adding ingredients, use kitchen shovel to stir-fry continuously. When ingredients are cooked, use bowl to serve!

Light a stove and start cooking delicious food
advancements.kaleidoscope_cookery.tomato: Don't forget to wear a straw hat when clearing grass, besides grass seeds, there might be other discoveries
advancements.kaleidoscope_cookery.transm: Eat using the Transmutation Lunch Bag
effect.kaleidoscope_cookery.flatulence.d: Sneak to fart, and gain ejection effect.
effect.kaleidoscope_cookery.mustard.desc: Creepers nearby will flee from you.
effect.kaleidoscope_cookery.preservation: Eating rotten flesh, raw chicken, poisonous potatoes, pufferfish, or spider eyes will not cause debuffs.
effect.kaleidoscope_cookery.satiated_shi: Hunger value acts as extra health; damage is absorbed by hunger value first.
effect.kaleidoscope_cookery.tundra_strid: Move faster on snow, ice, and powder snow, and do not sink into powder snow.
effect.kaleidoscope_cookery.warmth.descr: Slowly regenerate health when near heat sources such as stoves, campfires, lava etc.
item.kaleidoscope_cookery.fish_flavored_: Fish Flavored Shredded Pork Rice Bowl

tip.kaleidoscope_cookery.pot.done: The cooking is complete and the dish is ready!
tip.kaleidoscope_cookery.pot.need_carrie: Need to right click with the %s to take it out!

tip.kaleidoscope_cookery.pot.need_lit_st: Lack of the necessary heat source

tooltip.kaleidoscope_cookery.stargazy_pi: Fish heads breaking through the pie gazing at the sky, as if pondering something...

tooltip.kaleidoscope_cookery.stockpot_li: Used for stockpot, can also be used as a shield
